positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of a roaring celestial lion standing majestically on a crescent moon. The lion should have powerful, flowing manes and an aggressive, yet noble profile. The color palette should be monochromatic deep sapphire blue and glowing gold, providing high contrast against a deep void black background. The composition must be centered, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and negative space, ideal for a striking apparel graphic. Include subtle stellar dust and geometric celestial elements radiating from the lion's form. Vector graphic quality, intricate line work, symmetry, high contrast.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noisy, copyright, logo, trademark
